artifacts.description: Reproducible scenario model with packet-based formulas, option simulations, gate checks, sensitivity checks, validation checks, and final decision outputs.
Process gate memo with row-level packet citations, intermediate calculations, sensitivity checks, uncertainty notes, and final pass/warn/fail/needs_review matrix.

assumptions_flagged: Option losses treated as relative percentage reductions; absolute-point loss interpretation was not specified and was flagged for review

key_gate_outcomes.R1: FAIL (Li insufficient in base and simulated variants)
key_gate_outcomes.R2: FAIL (multiple spec failures in base and simulated variants)
key_gate_outcomes.R3: PASS in base; option variants flagged NEEDS_REVIEW due unresolved loss interpretation
